testcase.classname: Plugin aws-durable-execution-sdk-js with @aws/durable-execution-sdk-js >=1.1.0 (1.1.0) without configuration withDurableExecution() - workflow.execute
testcase.name: should generate span with correct tags (happy path)

testcase.classname: Plugin aws-durable-execution-sdk-js with @aws/durable-execution-sdk-js >=1.1.0 (1.1.0) without configuration withDurableExecution() - workflow.execute
testcase.name: should generate span even when handler errors (error path)

testcase.classname: Plugin aws-durable-execution-sdk-js with @aws/durable-execution-sdk-js >=1.1.0 (1.1.0) without configuration DurableContextImpl.step() - workflow.step.execute
